ops.body: Done in dcfaa47 (PR #2, v0.31.0): store() mints a crypto/rand generation nonce per write, stamped into the manifest, a chunks.json envelope, and the vectors.bin header; loadPersisted rejects any mismatch (rebuild). schemaVersion bumped to 2 so pre-nonce caches reject cleanly. Round-trip + torn-cache (mixed-generation) regression tests; refuter sweep of interrupted write orderings found no remaining window.
